content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can now clearly identify all the neighbour atoms of atom 27 (Carbon):

## Neighbour Atoms of C:27

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 0 | Oxygen (O) |
| 1 | Carbon (C) |
| 30 | Carbon (C) |
| 28 | Hydrogen (H) |

**geomconf_index: 9025**

Atom 27 is a carbon atom with four covalent bonds (tetrahedral geometry), connected to:
- An oxygen atom (O:0)
- A carbon atom (C:30) which has two hydrogens (H:58 and H:59) attached
- A carbon atom (C:1) which is connected to two nitrogen atoms (N:2 and N:3)
- A hydrogen atom (H:28)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 27, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
